rationale: The proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §37.143 governs school offense citations and child custody—unrelated subject matter with no operative overlap.
quote: A peace officer, law enforcement officer, or school resource officer may not issue a citation to a child who is alleged to have committed a school offense.
_note: No textual or topical nexus between proposed change and cited rule.
